entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange providing spot markets, perpetual futures, market data, grid and quantitative trading products, account-based trading, and API connectivity.
entity.notes: Current first-party website exposes markets, spot trading, futures, TradFi, prediction-market, referral, and rewards navigation. Current markets and BTC/USDT perpetual pages remain accessible in July 2026. HEI consolidates FameEX spot and derivatives discovery rows under one exchange entity.

evidence.title: FameEX official exchange platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party website exposes Markets, Trade, Futures, TradFi, Prediction Market, Referral, Rewards, and current promotional activity dated through July 2026.

evidence.title: FameEX spot markets
evidence.notes: Current first-party markets page exposes spot and futures market categories and active trading navigation.

evidence.title: FameEX BTC/USDT perpetual swaps
evidence.notes: Current first-party perpetual trading page identifies BTC/USDT perpetual swaps and exposes login, signup, markets, trade, and futures navigation.
